productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men Grey Melange Briefs
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs lives up to the brand's ideals. Its stylish waistband and double layered front pouch give you a body enhancing fit. Product DetailsGrey melange brief, bright blue elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front pouch for extra support and comfort, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritation, branding loop at front waistbandMaterial and Care96% cotton and 4% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
